parsing_res_list.block_content: A computer doesn't forget things, it doesn't get tired and doesn't make mistakes, but a computer cannot think on its own. It just follows our commands. Finally, who is smarter, you or the computer? Why do you think so?
Can a computer solve sums quickly? ---
How is a computer different from you? Write 'Y' for yes or 'N' for no in the blanes
• Computer is a very useful and helpful machine.

markdown.text:
A computer doesn't forget things, it doesn't get tired and doesn't make mistakes, but a computer cannot think on its own. It just follows our commands. Finally, who is smarter, you or the computer? Why do you think so? Can a computer think? Does a computer make mistakes?
Can you think? --- Does a computer get tired? Do you make mistakes? Can a computer solve sums quickly? --- Does a computer forget things? Do you get tired? Can you solve sums quickly? --- Do you forget things? How is a computer different from you? Write 'Y' for yes or 'N' for no in the blanes #### LET'S HAVE FUN
• Computer follows our commands. • Computer understands machine language. - Computer has different parts. • Computer is a very useful and helpful machine. • Computer is a smart machine. • Computer is our friend. Now, you know that:

parsing_res_list.block_content: Sit straight in front of a computer.

Always take permission of your elders or teachers before using a computer.

Take help of your elders or teachers whenever in need.
Things that we should do when we use a computer.
Now I know that my friend computer is a very useful smart electronic machine. But, how should I take care of it?

I love my friends and take care to keep them safe. How can we take care of our friend Computer?

Do's of a computer
DO'S AND DON'TS OF A COMPUTER

markdown.text:
Always take permission of your elders or teachers before using a computer. Take help of your elders or teachers whenever in need.
Things that we should do when we use a computer.
#### DO'S OF A COMPUTER Now I know that my friend computer is a very useful smart electronic machine. But, how should I take care of it?
#### Don'ts of a computer I love my friends and take care to keep them safe. How can we take care of our friend Computer? Do's of a computer

parsing_res_list.block_content: Don't keep the sound loud when playing music or games.
Don't insert pencil, ruler or any such thing into a computer.
Never sit very close to a computer.
#### Don't eat or drink near a computer.
Never touch the mouse or the keyboard with dirty hands.

Things that we should not do while using a computer.

Never switch off the computer directly from the main power supply button.

Never touch or play with the wires of a computer.
In school, take turns to use the computer.
Keep the computer clean and dry.
Use the mouse on a mouse pad.
Press the keys of the keyboard gently.

markdown.text:
Don't keep the sound loud when playing music or games.
Don't insert pencil, ruler or any such thing into a computer.
Never sit very close to a computer.
#### Don't eat or drink near a computer. Never touch the mouse or the keyboard with dirty hands.
Things that we should not do while using a computer. Never switch off the computer directly from the main power supply button. Never touch or play with the wires of a computer.
#### DON'TS OF A COMPUTER
In school, take turns to use the computer.
Keep the computer clean and dry.
Use the mouse on a mouse pad.
Press the keys of the keyboard gently.
